neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.nodes.v1: WITH __value AS event FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN event.op = 'upsert' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (node:CPGNode {id: event.node.id}) SET node += event.node) WITH event OPTIONAL MATCH (obsolete:CPGNode {id: event.node.id}) WHERE event.op = 'delete' DETACH DELETE obsolete
neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.edges.v1: WITH __value AS event FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN event.op = 'upsert' THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (source:CPGNode {id: event.edge.source_id}) ON CREATE SET source.kind = 'PLACEHOLDER' MERGE (target:CPGNode {id: event.edge.target_id}) ON CREATE SET target.kind = 'PLACEHOLDER' MERGE (source)-[edge:CPG_EDGE {id: event.edge.id}]->(target) SET edge += event.edge) WITH event OPTIONAL MATCH ()-[obsolete:CPG_EDGE {id: event.edge.id}]->() WHERE event.op = 'delete' DELETE obsolete
errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: cpg.neo4j-dlq.v1
